title: Emihead's Bookshelves
description: Slight adjustments to a few bookshelves, vanilla and modded
body:
Quick and dirty resource pack that edits some bookshelf textures. Main focus was making the tops of the shelves make structural sense when viewed next to the sides. I tried to make them tile neatly and work well as floors. There are also a couple custom textures for Every Compat bookshelves.

Feel free to edit the pack however you want for your modpack, I really don't care. One thing you might wanna do if you're using a mod like Woodworks instead of Quark is move the custom Every Compat textures from /q/ to /abnww/. I just put them under Quark because I made this pack with Raspberry Flavored in mind.
